About.heading:
About
{brand}
About.introTitle: Born in the West of Greece.
About.intro1: {brand} started the way most things worth doing start, with frustration. We couldn't find streetwear that felt both premium and personal, both sharp and wearable in the heat of a Greek summer. So we made our own.
About.intro2: Founded in Preveza in 2024, {brand} is a small independent label built around one idea: that where you're from shouldn't limit what you wear. We design pieces that can move from the streets of a quiet Greek town to the front row of anything, no apology required.
About.intro3: Everything is designed in-house. Every drop is intentional. We don't chase trends. We make things we'd actually wear, and trust that the right people will find them.
About.pillar01Body: Every piece starts with a sketch, not a sales target. We design for the garment, then figure out the rest.
About.pillar02Body: We use heavyweight, high-quality fabrics because fast fashion isn't something we believe in. Buy less, wear more.
About.pillar03Body: Our studio lets you customise any piece: colours, prints, placement. If you're going to wear something, it should be yours.
About.closingBody: {brand} is young, intentionally small, and not in a hurry. We'd rather get it right than get it fast. Follow along. The best is still ahead.

Shipping.heading: SHIPPING
Shipping.intro: We ship every NORELIA. order with care. Whether you're across town or across borders, here's everything you need to know before and after you place your order.
Shipping.method1Detail: Available for all destinations within Greece. Orders are processed within 1–2 business days and dispatched via ACS Courier or ELTA. You'll receive a tracking number by email once your order ships.
Shipping.method2Detail: Need it faster? Select express at checkout for next-day or 2-day delivery within Greece. Orders placed before 13:00 are dispatched same day.
Shipping.method3Detail: We ship to all EU countries and select international destinations. Delivery times and rates vary by destination. Customs duties and import taxes may apply and are the responsibility of the recipient.
Shipping.note: Delivery times are estimates and may vary during peak periods, public holidays, or due to circumstances beyond our control. Once an order has been dispatched, NORELIA. is not responsible for delays caused by the courier.

Returns.heading:
RETURNS &
EXCHANGES
Returns.intro: We want you to love what you ordered. If something isn't right, here's how we make it right.
Returns.section1Detail: You have 14 days from the date of delivery to request a return. Items must be unworn, unwashed, and in their original condition with all tags attached. Sale items and customised pieces from our Design Your Own studio are final sale and cannot be returned.
Returns.section2Detail: Email us at hello@norelia.com with your order number and reason for return. We'll respond within 1–2 business days with a return authorisation and instructions. Once we receive and inspect the item, your refund will be processed within 5–7 business days to your original payment method.
Returns.section3Detail: Want a different size or colour? We offer free exchanges on full-price items within 14 days of delivery. Simply contact us at hello@norelia.com and we'll sort it out. Exchanges are subject to stock availability.
Returns.section4Detail: If your order arrives damaged or you received the wrong item, please contact us within 48 hours of delivery with photos. We'll arrange a replacement or full refund at no cost to you. No questions asked.
Returns.note: are the responsibility of the customer unless the item is faulty or incorrect. We recommend using a tracked service as we cannot be held responsible for returns lost in transit.

Terms.heading:
TERMS OF
SERVICE
Terms.section1Detail: By placing an order on this website you confirm that you are at least 18 years old and agree to these terms in full. These terms are governed by Greek law and any disputes will be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of Preveza, Greece.
Terms.section2Detail: All prices are displayed in Euros (€) and include VAT where applicable. We reserve the right to refuse or cancel any order, including after confirmation, if we detect fraud, pricing errors, or stock discrepancies. In such cases you will receive a full refund. Promotional codes are single-use and cannot be combined.
Terms.section3Detail: Orders placed through the Design Your Own studio are made to order. By uploading your artwork you confirm you own the rights to use it commercially and that it does not infringe third-party intellectual property. NORELIA. accepts no liability for content uploaded by customers.
Terms.section4Detail: All designs, graphics, product names, and brand assets on this site are the exclusive property of {brand} and may not be reproduced, copied, or distributed without written permission. The site software and structure are also protected by copyright.
Terms.section5Detail: {brand}'s total liability for any claim arising from a purchase is limited to the value of the order in question. We are not liable for indirect or consequential losses. We do not guarantee uninterrupted access to this website.
Terms.section6Detail: We may update these terms at any time. The version in force at the time of your order applies to that order. Continued use of the site after a terms update constitutes acceptance of the new terms. This version was last updated in May 2026.
Terms.intro: Please read these terms carefully before ordering. By purchasing from {brand} you agree to be bound by the conditions set out below.
Terms.note: Contact us at hello@norelia.com. We aim to respond to all enquiries within one business day.

SizeGuide.heading: SIZE GUIDE
SizeGuide.intro: All NORELIA. garments are sized XS through XL. Measure yourself and use the table below to find your best fit.
SizeGuide.measureChest: Chest: Measure horizontally around the fullest part of your chest.
SizeGuide.measureWaist: Waist: Measure around the narrowest part of your torso.
SizeGuide.measureHip: Hips: Measure around the fullest part.
